name: @briangaoo/totem
description: Totem — talk to your wearables with AI over MCP. Today: full Whoop access via its private iOS API (48 tools, read + write, zod-validated outputs, auto-refresh Cognito auth). Fitbit, Apple Watch, and Garmin adapters in progress.
author: Brian Gao
_scripts_note: All workflows are `totem <command>` (build, dev, dev:http, start, test, typecheck, auth, cloud, local, deploy, logs, ping, …). The only npm steps are `npm install` and, for the one-time build before the CLI is linked, `npx tsc`. See README → Get Started.
